title: Software Update - DFU - Headset and Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings - Update All
scenario: DFU is blocked with a "try back later" popup when headset or charge case battery is below 5%, and only proceeds after both are plugged into chargers.
steps: 1. Ensure headset and charge case are on outdated firmware.
2. Ensure both headset and charge case have battery levels below 5%.
3. Ensure both devices are NOT plugged into power.
4. Attempt to perform 'Update All' from the app or interface.
6. Plug both headset and charge case into chargers.
8. Observe that the DFU proceeds and completes successfully.
expected: When battery is low (<5%) and devices are not plugged in, attempting "Update All" shows a popup: "Update currently not available, please try back later". Only when both devices are plugged into chargers does the DFU proceed and complete successfully.
